action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 2 validated beam search on the 3-epoch checkpoint, raising exprate from 1.58% to 2.25%. The pipeline is solid but severely undertrained. Analysis: With ~4.16h left, I can commit to a longer training run. Key improvements needed: (1) data augmentation (rotation, scale, translate) for handwritten variability, (2) label smoothing + OneCycleLR for better convergence, (3) LayerNorm after encoder projection and dropout in decoder for stability, (4) larger batch size (48) and persistent_workers to improve throughput, (5) proper jsonl logging so curves populate. Decision: Write updated model.py, train.py, and predict.py, then launch a 15-epoch training run. I'll use batch_size=48 to reduce steps-per-epoch and keep total runtime under the budget.
